meaning: 特拉凡哥尔[印度西南部一地区]
examples: His brother borrowed schoolbooks and copied them for Narayanan, helping him to eventually graduate with a degree in English literature from the University of Travancore.
Mr. Bhushan said most of the temple’s assets were deposited by the royal family and came from the pepper that the Travancore kingdom used to sell to Europeans and others.
Vaults containing vast quantities of gold and jewellery from the 18th-century kingdom of Travancore were found under a Hindu temple in the capital of the Indian state of Kerala.
The royal family of India's erstwhile southern kingdom of Travancore has a long history of resistance.
